name: wireframeValidate
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.valid === 'boolean'
_note: app-maker.wireframeValidate is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/appmaker.js:235), reached only via /api/lens/run on the HYPHENATED key 'app-maker.wireframeValidate'. DETERMINISTIC graph lint: BFS reachability + broken-link/dead-end/orphan/unreachable detection over a wireframe's screen graph — no LLM, no network. A broken link (link target not in the screen set) makes valid:false. An empty/absent/non-array wireframe degrades graceful (ok:true 'No wireframe screens to validate' OR a caught handler_error), never throws. LENS_ACTIONS-only → not driven by the MACROS-based macro-assassin; pinned behaviorally by server/tests/appmaker-lens-macros.test.js + server/tests/app-maker-domain-parity.test.js.
